Markup by Before Semicolon

Primary docs for AI agents:

- /documentation/ai - AI-first overview of Markup, Web Component, and Router usage
- /documentation/guide - general onboarding and best practices
- /documentation/get-started - install and first render
- /documentation/templating/index - template rendering and interpolation rules
- /documentation/state/index - state and effect behavior
- /documentation/utilities/index - helper reference
- /documentation/capabilities/web-component - custom element API, lifecycles, events, slots, refs, and form controls
- /documentation/capabilities/router - navigation, route matching, and page data

Use these pages before scanning the rest of the site.
